customer.title: Customer
customer.description: Represents a customer of the warehouse.

name.description: The full name of the customer.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

phone.description: The phone number of the customer.

address.description: The physical address of the customer.

fatherName.description: The father's name of the customer.

commodity.title: Commodity
commodity.description: Represents a type of commodity with specific rent rates.

name.description: The name of the commodity (e.g., Paddy, Maize).

rate6Months.description: The rent rate per bag for a 6-month period.

rate1Year.description: The rent rate per bag for a 1-year period.

lot.title: Lot
lot.description: Represents a specific storage location within the warehouse.

name.description: The unique identifier for the lot (e.g., A1/Top).

storageRecord.title: Storage Record
storageRecord.description: Represents a record of items being stored by a customer.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer who owns these items.

commodityDescription.description: A description of the commodity being stored.

location.description: The location within the warehouse where the items are stored (Lot No.).

bagsStored.description: The number of bags being stored.

storageStartDate.description: The date when the storage period began.

storageEndDate.description: The date when the storage period ended. Null if still active.

billingCycle.description: The current billing cycle for the record.

totalRentBilled.description: The total rent amount that has been billed for this record.

lorryTractorNo.description: The Lorry or Tractor number for the delivery.

weight.description: The weight of the stored items.

inflowType.description: The type of inflow, either Direct from the vehicle or from a Plot.

dryingRecordId.description: The ID of the associated drying record, if inflow type is 'Plot'.

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Represents a payment made towards a storage record.

date.description: The date the payment was made.

type.description: The type of payment, which can be for rent, hamali, or other charges.

date.description: The date the expense was incurred.

unloadingRecord.title: Unloading Record
unloadingRecord.description: Represents a record of items being unloaded from a vehicle.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer who owns these items.

commodityDescription.description: A description of the commodity being unloaded.

lorryTractorNo.description: The Lorry or Tractor number for the delivery.

unloadingDate.description: The date when the unloading took place.

bagsUnloaded.description: The number of bags being unloaded.

status.description: The current status of the process.

hamaliPerBag.description: The hamali charge per bag for this unloading event.

totalHamali.description: The total hamali charge for this unloading event.

billNo.description: The bill number associated with this unloading record.

dryingRecord.title: Drying Record
dryingRecord.description: Represents the entire drying process for a commodity, from unloading to billing.

unloadingRecordId.description: The ID of the source unloading record.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer who owns these items.

commodityDescription.description: A description of the commodity being processed.

bagsForDrying.description: The number of bags sent for drying.

bagsPacked.description: The number of bags after packing is complete.

status.description: The current stage of the drying process.

dryingStartDate.description: The date the drying process began.

packingDate.description: The date packing was completed. Null if not yet packed.

billingDate.description: The date the process was billed. Null if not yet billed.

hamaliPerBag.description: The hamali charge per bag for the drying process.

totalDryingHamali.description: The total hamali charge for this drying process.

/commodities/{commodityId}.description: Stores documents for different types of commodities and their rent rates.

/lots/{lotId}.description: Stores documents for each storage lot in the warehouse.

/unloadingRecords/{unloadingId}.description: Stores records of the unloading process.

/dryingRecords/{dryingId}.description: Stores records of the drying process.
